mapper.select: SELECT nu.notification_user_id AS id, nu.user_id, nu.viewed, n.sender_id, n.message, n.created_at, n.type, u.name, w.workshop_id AS workshopId, w.name AS workshopName FROM notification_user nu LEFT JOIN notification n ON nu.notification_id = n.notification_id LEFT JOIN user u ON n.sender_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN workshop w ON n.workshop_id = w.workshop_id WHERE nu.notification_user_id = #{id}

SELECT nu.notification_user_id AS id, nu.user_id, nu.viewed, n.message, n.created_at FROM notification_user nu JOIN user u ON nu.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN notification n ON nu.notification_id = n.notification_id WHERE nu.user_id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'CUSTOMER' ORDER BY n.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_user SET viewed = TRUE WHERE notification_user_id = #{id}

UPDATE notification_user SET viewed = TRUE WHERE notification_user_id IN
#{id}
